title: MEXICAN CONSULATE - 211info
text: MEXICAN CONSULATE MEXICAN CONSULATE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Issues and renews passports and matrícula consular cards. Issues student, work, and retiree visas, and provides assistance with other documents. 1305 SW 12th Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Consulate hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, Saturday-Sunday appointments available by request Mexitel phone hours: Monday-Friday 6am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-4pm Email (503) 274-1442 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Consulate (503) 274-1442 General information Appointments via Mexitel (424) 309-0009 For passport and matrícula consular appointments Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Call or visit website for more information -Call Mexitel or visit website to make an appointment to get or renew a passport or matrícula consular card -Mexican visa applications are available online -Visit website for mobile consulate dates and locations FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Immigration Issues Consulates/Foreign Government Representatives Identification Cards Matricula Consular Cards Passports Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - MOBILE CONSULATE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MEXICAN CONSULATE
